M

M0Card - Interface in com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless
Deprecated.
Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
M1Card - Interface in com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless
Deprecated.
Replaced by "MifareClassicCard" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
